source: SPARC fast packet / SPARC public database
observable: regular disk carrier and edge-on orientation
value: T=6; Q=1; inclination=90.0 deg; RHI/Rdisk=5.112; rotation_ref=Sw09,Sw02
interpretation: Supports UGC07151 as a high-inclination regular disk candidate with extended H I context. This does not by itself prove WVO/warp support.

source: Truncations of stellar disks and warps of HI-layers in edge-on spiral galaxies
observable: UGC 7151 H I extent / truncation-warps context
value: Paper notes UGC 7151 among systems whose H I distributions do not extend significantly farther than the optical image.
interpretation: This weakens the case for using UGC07151 as the first clean expdisk+WVO analogue. It is better treated as an orientation/truncation control unless independent WVO/onset evidence is found.
